arts.ttl: Former Derby County boss Wayne Rooney slams his players after thumping at Norwich
arts.sum: Plymouth head coach and former Rams boss Wayne Rooney conceded his team deserved no better after their 6-1 thrashing by Norwich, with Borja Sainz notching his second hat-trick of the season, leaving Argyle to reflect on a third significant away defeat. Rooney also said, "I have praised them a lot this season for their performances at home – but away needs to much better than this and we have got to get to the bottom of why it keeps happening – it can’t carry on like this."

arts.ttl: Derby County v Swansea City TV channel, kick-off time and team news
arts.sum: Swansea City head to Derby County tonight in Championship action

arts.ttl: Paul Warne issues firm stance as he reveals 'candid' talks with Derby County winger
arts.sum: Paul Warne has revealed he has had a "candid" conversation with winger Corey Blackett-Taylor as the Derby County winger fights for a first-team place. There has been clamour in some quarters for him to play more games but Derby head coach Warne said he discussed the situation with the winger on Monday.

arts.ttl: Derby County record loss as Rams publish accounts and David Clowes investment laid bare
arts.sum: The increased valuation figure of Moor Farm has impacted the previous impairment of goodwill announced in last year's accounts which was £19.7m Goodwill is calculated by taking a business's purchase price and subtracting the difference between its fair market value and liabilities. The £14.2m loss, an increase of £3.5m from last year's figure of £10.6m, includes a number of one-off exceptional costs such as player bonuses and contractual clauses following promotion back to the Championship.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne in Derby County injury update and reveals David Ozoh plan
arts.sum: On-loan Wolves midfielder Tawanda Chirewa is also battling for a place back in Derby's squad with Ryan Nyambe now the only long-term absentee due to a knee problem. Derby County's injury problems have significantly eased ahead of their clash against Swansea tomorrow, but Paul Warne is still being cautious with on-loan Crystal Palace midfielder David Ozoh.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne issues contract stance after welcome Derby County deal
arts.sum: If anybody knocked on my door now and said what's the situation with my contract, and they had only played one game, I would say currently it's not looking amazing. Paul Warne says there are currently no further contract talks planned with any of his Derby County players who are free to leave the club next summer.

arts.sum: The Ibrox side are feeling the heat after falling further behind in the table but have made a big move off the field

arts.ttl: Double deal, contracts and exits - what might happen in Derby County's January transfer window - Derbyshire Live
arts.sum: Derby's failure to land a striker on deadline day wasn't through the want of trying but through a combination of sky-high prices and players staying put, that ultimately ended their search for a number nine. A host of players in the last year of their contracts have struggled for minutes this season, making them the most likely candidates to source new clubs.
